title: Password Reset SLA
text: Contractor password reset tickets are handled by access operations and should be completed within 4 business hours during the work week.

title: Vendor Onboarding Queue
text: Vendor onboarding requests belong in the access operations queue because that team verifies provisioning prerequisites and account ownership.

title: Sandbox Log Retention
text: Sandbox application logs are retained for 7 days, while production audit logs are retained for 30 days.

title: Refund Escalation Rule
text: Escalate a blocked refund request after 2 unsuccessful processor attempts, even if unrelated billing profile details changed recently.

title: Duplicate Invoice Ownership
text: Billing operations owns duplicate invoice issues that appear immediately after a plan downgrade or proration recalculation.

title: Merged Ticket Lifecycle
text: If a merged ticket is older than 30 days, support should recreate the issue instead of reopening the original thread.

title: PII Deletion Verification
text: A personal data deletion request must not be processed until account ownership is verified through the approved verification workflow.

title: Tenant Impact Incident Rule
text: Open a severity 2 incident when multiple tenants report active impact, even if the public status page is still green.

title: Security Exception Requirement
text: Reject a security exception request until an explicit expiration date and business owner are provided.

title: Batch Retry Threshold
text: A batch job is marked failed after 3 retries so downstream reconciliations do not loop indefinitely.

title: Reliability Review Notes
text: Prompt reliability reviews should compare near-duplicate queries, track answer consistency, and flag cases where distractor details change the decision.

title: Monitoring Recommendations
text: Lightweight monitoring for retrieval services should start with request latency and retrieval hit rate, then expand to topic drift and guardrail trigger frequency.
